# stack_config (Data Source)

Reads the install stack configuration for a stack run. Templated values will be interpolated in the context of the install.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "stack_config" "this" {
  phone_home_id = var.phone_home_id
}

output "install_id" {
  value = data.stack_config.this.install_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `phone_home_id` (String) Per-stack-version identifier from the Nuon control plane; acts as the secret for this read.

### Read-Only

- `app_id` (String) Nuon application ID.
- `auto_generate_secrets` (List of String) Names of secrets the stack should auto-generate.
- `cloud` (String) Target cloud (aws or gcp).
- `gcp` (Attributes) GCP-specific configuration. Present when cloud is gcp. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--gcp))
- `install_id` (String) Nuon install ID.
- `install_inputs` (Map of String) Customer install-input values.
- `org_id` (String) Nuon organization ID.
- `phone_home_url` (String) Phone-home URL the module reports run completion to.
- `runner_api_url` (String) Runner API URL the runner reports to.
- `runner_id` (String) Runner ID for this install.
- `secrets` (Attributes Map, Sensitive) Customer-supplied secrets, keyed by name. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--secrets))

<a id="nestedatt--gcp"></a>

### Nested Schema for `gcp`

Read-Only:

- `break_glass_roles` (Attributes Map) Break-glass roles, keyed by name. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--gcp--break_glass_roles))
- `custom_roles` (Attributes Map) Customer-defined roles, keyed by name. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--gcp--custom_roles))
- `deprovision_permissions` (List of String) Deprovision service-account permissions.
- `deprovision_predefined_role` (String) Deprovision predefined role, if any.
- `maintenance_permissions` (List of String) Maintenance service-account permissions.
- `maintenance_predefined_role` (String) Maintenance predefined role, if any.
- `provision_permissions` (List of String) Provision service-account permissions.
- `provision_predefined_role` (String) Provision predefined role, if any.
- `runner_api_token` (String, Sensitive) Runner API token.
- `runner_init_script_url` (String) Runner bootstrap script URL.

<a id="nestedatt--gcp--break_glass_roles"></a>

### Nested Schema for `gcp.break_glass_roles`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the role should be created.
- `permissions` (List of String) IAM permissions bound to the role's service account.
- `predefined_role` (String) Predefined role bound to the service account, if any.

<a id="nestedatt--gcp--custom_roles"></a>

### Nested Schema for `gcp.custom_roles`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the role should be created.
- `permissions` (List of String) IAM permissions bound to the role's service account.
- `predefined_role` (String) Predefined role bound to the service account, if any.

<a id="nestedatt--secrets"></a>

### Nested Schema for `secrets`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Secret description.
- `required` (Boolean) Whether the secret is required.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Secret value.
